title: The Overfitting Problem in Time Series Analysis
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of model training, the trade-off between model complexity and error, and the resulting problem of overfitting.
relationships: Data is used to train both a Simple and a Complex Model
A Simple Model results in higher Training Error but lower Generalization Error
A Complex Model results in very low Training Error but high Generalization Error
High Generalization Error indicates poor future performance (Overfitting)
